scripts.deploy:infra:demo: cd infra && npm run deploy:demo && cd ..
scripts.deploy:app:demo: npm run build:demo && node scripts/deploy-app.js demo
scripts.deploy:app:staging: npm run build:staging && node scripts/deploy-app.js staging
scripts.deploy:app:prod: npm run build:prod && node scripts/deploy-app.js prod
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:app
scripts.deploy:full: npm run build && npm run deploy:infra && npm run deploy:app
